notes: Passive - parses the page's __NEXT_DATA__ for spotlightHighlights/curatedHighlights timestamps and overlays a '.snapchat-timestamp-added' div on each matching [data-testid="content-tile"], then appends a '.myosint-attribution-badge' div with 'Modified by a Bookmarklet'. Generous wait_ms since it must parse the (large) __NEXT_DATA__ script after the page hydrates. Failure paths show alerts: 'Could not find Snapchat __NEXT_DATA__ on this page.', 'No Spotlight or Stories data found.', or 'No matching cards found to add timestamps to.' - if the profile layout changes those alerts would fire instead.

checks.comment: Attribution badge appears after timestamps are added
At least one content tile got a timestamp overlay
